name: Pinterest Pin Uploader
prompt:
Upload pins to Pinterest using browser automation. This is a MECHANICAL task — no creativity or judgment needed. Just follow the steps exactly.

If the batch has 0 pins, respond with [SILENT].

Step 1: Read credentials from the script output above (pinterest_email, pinterest_password fields). Also read TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL from the script output or from ~/.hermes/.env via execute_code. Save a helper function to send Telegram notifications:
```python
import urllib.request, json

def send_telegram(bot_token, chat_id, text):
    data = json.dumps({"chat_id": chat_id, "text": text}).encode()
    req = urllib.request.Request(
        f"https://api.telegram.org/bot{bot_token}/sendMessage",
        data=data, headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    )
    urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
```

Step 2: Log in to Pinterest:
- browser_navigate to https://www.pinterest.com/login/
- browser_type email into the Email field
- browser_type password into the Password field
- browser_click "Log in" button
- Wait 5 seconds, take snapshot to verify login

Step 3: For each pin in the "batch" array, do exactly this:

  a. Send Telegram notification: "⏳ Uploading pin [N/total]: [product_name]..."

  b. Download image: use execute_code to save primary_image URL to /tmp/pin_image.jpg

  c. browser_navigate to https://www.pinterest.com/pin-creation-tool/

  d. Select board: browser_click the board dropdown, browser_type "SmartyPants9786" in the search, browser_click the board name

  e. Upload image: Use browser_click on "File upload" button, then use the file input to upload /tmp/pin_image.jpg

  f. Fill fields:
     - browser_type the "title" into the title field
     - browser_type the "description" into the description field  
     - browser_click "Add alt text", then browser_type the "alt_text"
     - browser_type the "link" (affiliate URL) into destination link field

  g. browser_click "Publish"

  h. Wait 5 seconds for confirmation

  i. Send Telegram notification: "✅ Pin uploaded: [product_name]" (or "❌ Pin failed: [product_name] - [error]")

  j. Update pin file: use execute_code to read the pin's _file_path, change status to "uploaded" (or "failed"), add uploaded_at timestamp, write back

  k. Wait 5 seconds before next pin (rate limiting)

Step 4: Send final Telegram notification:
"📌 Pinterest upload batch complete: [uploaded]/[total] pins uploaded to SmartyPants9786"

Step 5: Final response — plain text summary listing each pin uploaded or failed. No markdown.
